name: Supernatural Object Series - The Door
description:
“Curiosity killed the cat, and you’re very much stepping into the unknown.”

—Someone who isn't an idiot.

The Door is a mysterious wooden door found in some odd place. You can even swear you see light of prismatic color beaming through the cracks of it. However, stepping through it can very much take you to a place you never wanted to end up in. A basic meadow of grass hills? Inside a volcano? Somewhere in space? Or perhaps even another world entirely? You never know what you’re getting yourself into, making your way to the other side of the door. Don’t complain if you somehow end up in the stone age, or literal Hell.
creator: Gray005
